name: example-html-ppt-obsidian-claude-gradient
title: Html Ppt Obsidian Claude Gradient
description: GitHub 暗紫渐变 deck — GitHub-dark #0d1117 + 紫蓝 radial 环境光 + 60px 网格 mask、居中布局、紫色 pill 标签、三色渐变标题（#a855f7→#60a5fa→#34d399）、GitHub 风代码 palette、紫色左边框高亮块。适合开发者工作流 / MCP / Agent / dev tool 教程，类似 GitHub Blog / Linear Changelog。

query.en: Use the html-ppt-obsidian-claude-gradient template to create a developer tutorial deck. Use a GitHub-style dark purple gradient, centered layout, purple pills, tri-color gradient headings, and configuration/step code blocks. First confirm what to teach, the target audience, and whether to include MCP or agent configuration examples.
query.zh-CN: 用 html-ppt-obsidian-claude-gradient 模板做一份开发者教程 PPT。GitHub 暗紫渐变 + 居中布局 + 紫色 pill + 三色渐变标题 + 配置/步骤代码块。先确认：教什么、目标受众、要不要 MCP/Agent 配置示例。
